findings.summary: Ground station (30 components). Protection device U4 (USBLC6-2SC6) counted as 4 entries (per-net duplication). 1 regulator and 2 RC filters correctly detected.

incorrect.description: Protection device U4 (USBLC6-2SC6) counted as 4 entries due to per-net counting instead of per-device

suggestions: Count multi-channel protection devices as single device instead of per-net
